entries.source: "I don't get negative numbers"
entries.value: "ମୁଁ ଋଣାତ୍ମକ ସଂଖ୍ୟା ବୁଝିପାରୁନାହିଁ"

entries.source: "I think heavier objects fall faster"
entries.value: "ମୁଁ ଭାବୁଛି ଭାରୀ ବସ୍ତୁଗୁଡ଼ିକ ଅଧିକ ଦ୍ରୁତ ଗତିରେ ତଳକୁ ପଡ଼ନ୍ତି"

entries.source: "Why is this grammar rule weird?"
entries.value: "ଏହି ବ୍ୟାକରଣ ନିୟମଟି କାହିଁକି ଅଜବ?"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Misconception Doctor on inspir for thinking learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: inspir ରେ Misconception Doctor କୁ ଚିନ୍ତନ ଶିକ୍ଷା ପାଇଁ ବ୍ୟବହାର କରିବାର ବ୍ୟବହାରିକ ଗାଇଡ୍, ପ୍ରମ୍ପ୍ଟ, ଅଧ୍ୟୟନ ଲୁପ୍ ଓ ଅଧିକ ସୁରକ୍ଷିତ AI ଅଭ୍ୟାସ ସହିତ।

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: ଅଧିକ ଶକ୍ତିଶାଳୀ ଅଧ୍ୟୟନ ଲୁପ୍

entries.source: Adapt the session to your goal.
entries.value: Adapt the ଅଧିବେଶନ କୁ ଆପଣଙ୍କ goal.

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: AI ଟ୍ୟୁଟର୍

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ ପାଇଁ a ଛୋଟ ପ୍ରଥମ ପଦକ୍ଷେପ rather than a ଶେଷ ଉତ୍ତର.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ the AI କୁ ଯାଞ୍ଚ ଆପଣଙ୍କ reasoning, ନୁହେଁ just the result.

entries.source: Find and fix wrong mental models.
entries.value: ଭୁଲ ମନୋମଡେଲ୍ ଖୋଜି ସୁଧାରନ୍ତୁ।

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: Finish ଦ୍ୱାରା ଲେଖନ the ଧାରଣା back ରୁ ସ୍ମୃତି.

entries.source: Learners exploring thinking topics who want practical guidance instead of a generic answer box.
entries.value: ଚିନ୍ତନ ବିଷୟ ଅନୁସନ୍ଧାନ କରୁଥିବା ଶିକ୍ଷାର୍ଥୀ ଯେଉଁମାନେ ଏକ ସାଧାରଣ ଉତ୍ତର ବାକ୍ସ ପରିବର୍ତ୍ତେ ବ୍ୟବହାରିକ ମାର୍ଗଦର୍ଶନ ଚାହାଁନ୍ତି।

entries.source: Misconception Doctor
entries.value: ମିସକନସେପସନ୍ ଡକ୍ଟର

entries.source: Misconception Doctor AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Say what you think is happening, and your buddy diagnoses hidden misconceptions with gentle tests.
entries.value: Misconception Doctor AI Learning Mode ହେଉଛି ନିଷ୍କ୍ରିୟ ଉତ୍ତର ସଂଗ୍ରହ ପରିବର୍ତ୍ତେ ଶିକ୍ଷା ପାଇଁ AI ବ୍ୟବହାର କରିବାର କେନ୍ଦ୍ରିତ ଉପାୟ। ଏହି ମୋଡ୍ ଏହି ନିର୍ଦ୍ଦିଷ୍ଟ କାମକୁ କେନ୍ଦ୍ର କରି ତିଆରି: Say what you think is happening, ଓ ଆପଣଙ୍କ buddy diagnoses hidden misconceptions ସହ gentle tests।

entries.source: Misconception Doctor AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: ଭୁଲ ଧାରଣା Doctor AI ଶିକ୍ଷା ମୋଡ୍: ବ୍ୟବହାରିକ ଗାଇଡ୍

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: ଚେଷ୍ଟା କରିବାକୁ ପ୍ରମ୍ପ୍ଟ

entries.source: Start the live mode at Misconception Doctor. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Feynman Tutor. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Misconception Doctor ରେ ଲାଇଭ୍ ମୋଡ୍ ଆରମ୍ଭ କରନ୍ତୁ। ପାଖାପାଖି ଶିକ୍ଷା ଫର୍ମାଟ୍ ଚାହିଁଲେ Feynman Tutor ଚେଷ୍ଟା କରନ୍ତୁ। ପ୍ଲାଟଫର୍ମର ବିସ୍ତୃତ ଦୃଶ୍ୟ ପାଇଁ AI ଶିକ୍ଷା ସାଥୀ ସମସ୍ତଙ୍କ ପାଇଁ କ’ଣ କରିବା ଉଚିତ ପଢ଼ନ୍ତୁ।

entries.source: Start with example prompts.
entries.value: ଉଦାହରଣ ପ୍ରମ୍ପ୍ଟ ସହ ଆରମ୍ଭ କରନ୍ତୁ।

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: Tell the ମୋଡ୍ କ’ଣ ଆପଣ ହେଉଛି trying କୁ ଶିଖନ୍ତୁ କିମ୍ବା produce.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: ସେହି ତଫାତ୍ flow ଭିତରେ ଦେଖାଯାଏ। ଏକ giant response ପରିବର୍ତ୍ତେ, ସର୍ବୋତ୍ତମ sessions ଏକ loop ମାଧ୍ୟମରେ ଯାଏ: goal set କରନ୍ତୁ, କିଛି ଚେଷ୍ଟା କରନ୍ତୁ, feedback ପାଆନ୍ତୁ, weak spot repair କରନ୍ତୁ, ଏବଂ next action ବାଛନ୍ତୁ।

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: ସେହି focus matters. A general chatbot ପାରେ ଉତ୍ତର almost anything, but a ଶିକ୍ଷା ମୋଡ୍ gives the conversation a shape. ଏହା nudges ଆପଣ toward the kind of thinking, ଅଭ୍ୟାସ, ମତାମତ, କିମ୍ବା exploration ସେହି helps the ଧାରଣା stick.

entries.source: Thinking
entries.value: ଚିନ୍ତନ

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: ଏହି ହେଉଛି the same ଅଭ୍ୟାସ behind studying ସହିତ AI ନକଲ୍ ଛଡ଼ା yourself: keep the ଶିକ୍ଷାର୍ଥୀ active. AI ହେଉଛି most ଉପଯୋଗୀ କେବେ ଏହା gives ଆପଣ ମତାମତ ଉପରେ ଆପଣଙ୍କ thinking.

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: ଏହି ମୋଡ୍ ହେଉଛି especially ଉପଯୋଗୀ ପାଇଁ ଶିକ୍ଷାର୍ଥୀ କିଏ want କୁ:

entries.source: This mode is tuned for misconception doctor with its own prompts, examples, and learning flow.
entries.value: ଏହି ମୋଡଟି ମିସକନସେପସନ୍ ଡକ୍ଟର ପାଇଁ ଏହାର ନିଜସ୍ୱ ପ୍ରମ୍ପ୍ଟ, ଉଦାହରଣ ଏବଂ ଶିକ୍ଷଣ ପ୍ରବାହ ସହିତ ଟିଉନ୍ କରାଯାଇଛି।

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: ପଦକ୍ଷେପଟିକୁ ନିଜ ଶବ୍ଦରେ ଚେଷ୍ଟା କରନ୍ତୁ।

entries.source: Use Misconception Doctor when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: ତୁରନ୍ତ ଆରମ୍ଭ ହେବା ସହିତ ଆପଣଙ୍କୁ ଅନୁକୂଳ ହୋଇପାରୁଥିବା session ଚାହିଁଲେ Misconception Doctor ବ୍ୟବହାର କରନ୍ତୁ। ପ୍ରଥମ ଲକ୍ଷ୍ୟ impressive ଶୁଣାଯିବା ନୁହେଁ; ପ୍ରଥମ ଲକ୍ଷ୍ୟ ପରବର୍ତ୍ତୀ ପଦକ୍ଷେପକୁ ସମ୍ଭବ ଲାଗିବା ଭାବେ କରିବା।

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: ଏହି ମୋଡ୍ କେଉଁଥିରେ ସାହାଯ୍ୟ କରେ

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: ପରେ କେଉଁଠାକୁ ଯିବେ

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: ଆପଣ ପାରେ also ଆରମ୍ଭ ସହିତ a rough version of ଆପଣଙ୍କ ବାସ୍ତବ ସମସ୍ୟା. A messy ପ୍ରଥମ ପ୍ରମ୍ପ୍ଟ ହେଉଛି fine. The ଅଧିବେଶନ ପାରେ clarify the level, ଦର୍ଶକ, deadline, ଓ style once ଆପଣ begin.
